description: Award-Match LLM ground-truth — Sprint 2026-05-11. 10 cases: 5 known matches (existing high-confidence cache hits), 3 confounders (5 plausible candidates but no real match), 2 no-match cases (Open tender, no Award yet exists). The candidate-list per case is hand-curated to ensure semantic diversity. The model must answer with the correct candidate-id (or null) AND a confidence score; we score on match-id correctness AND confidence calibration.

samples.label: NL-MedicalTrailers-MATCH

candidates.title: Military Medical Trailers Role 1 & 2
candidates.winner_name: KITE Mezőgazdasági Szolgáltató és Kereskedelmi Zrt.

candidates.title: Netherlands - Boat trailers for Royal Navy rubber boat transport
Netherlands MOD - General-purpose trailers
Military Trailers and Semi-trailers for Heavy Equipment Transport
Market Consultation: PATRIOT Weapon System Logistics Trailers

samples.notes: Subject identical (Military Medical Trailers Role 1 & 2). Award notice 8 months later. Same buyer.

samples.label: SE-BridgeKB8-MATCH

samples.label: DE-MOD-CONFOUNDER-NoMatch

candidates.title: Germany - Military Cargo Trailers 3.5t and 12.5t
Germany - Frame Agreement Manufacturing & Delivery (Trailers)
Container Trailer with Roll-off Containers
Hook-lift trucks with crane, trailers, flatbeds and containers
Military Trailers - Car/Van/Truck/Forklift Trailers

samples.notes: Target is a 2026 CN. None of the BAAINBw candidates are the matching CAN — they are different procurements (different weights/types). The model must NOT pick candidate 2 (719142-2025) just because it's 'BAAINBw + frame agreement' — semantic content (2-wheel 1t vs trailers generic) differs.

samples.label: PL-12WOG-CONFOUNDER

target.title: Supply of High, Medium and Small Capacity Transport Trailers

candidates.title: Poland - High-capacity transport trailers
Universal Containerized Maintenance-Repair Workshops (UKWO-N) without base chassis
Universal Container Maintenance Workshops (UKWO-N) without base chassis
Vehicle bodies, trailers or semi-trailers
Mobile Doppler Radar Tracking System on Trailer

samples.notes: Confounder dressed as a match: 12-WOG → 12-WOG, similar title (High Capacity). 261427-2025 is a SUBSET (only the high-capacity variant of the original 3-class procurement). Acceptable as match (partial subset) with moderate confidence — should NOT be 95+.

samples.label: FR-Motorcycles-CONFOUNDER

candidates.title: France - POSEIDON Shelter with associated services
Supply of welding units on trailers for the 25th Air Engineering Regiment
Climate-controlled road trailers for pyrotechnic specimens
Baggage, Pallet and Air Freight Transport Trailers
Baggage, Pallet and Air Freight Transport Trailers

samples.notes: No CAN exists for this target yet (it's a 2026 CN, only published 1 month before fixture date). All candidates are different procurements. Expect match=null.

samples.label: BE-99Tractors-NOMATCH

samples.notes: Belgian tractor+semi-trailer 99-94 procurement. Candidates 1+2+3 are same-country distractors with different subjects. The two foreign candidates (DK, IE) are clearly wrong. Expect match=null.
